description: Discover and replace proprietary apps with FOSS alternatives LibreFind is a free and lightweight Android app that scans your installed packages locally and queries our database to identify proprietary software and find FOSS alternatives. Core Features • Scan installed apps to detect proprietary software • Get FOSS alternative recommendations • View sovereignty scores showing FOSS vs proprietary ratio • Community-driven database Community Contributions • Propose new FOSS alternatives for review • Submit pros and cons for existing alternatives • Vote on app recommendations • Help build a comprehensive alternative database The app only queries the database for FOSS alternatives when proprietary apps are detected. LibreFind is fully open source under the MIT License. Contribute at: https://github.com/jksalcedo/librefind
